scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight
scale.caption: text-xs font-medium leading-normal
scale.micro_label: text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest leading-none font-mono

alignment_rules.headings: text-center md:text-left (unless section is explicitly centered)
alignment_rules.body: text-left (avoid center alignment for paragraphs > 3 lines)

colors.instructions: DO NOT CHANGE ANY COLORS. Use existing Tailwind classes or CSS variables provided in index.css.

grid_rules.landing_features: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 sm:gap-8
grid_rules.stats_bar: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-0 divide-x divide-slate-200/50

buttons.primary: font-heading font-semibold text-sm sm:text-base px-6 py-3 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: font-heading font-semibold text-sm sm:text-base px-6 py-3 rounded-full border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all duration-200
buttons.text_link: font-heading font-semibold text-sm text-orange-500 hover:text-orange-600 underline-offset-4 hover:underline

cards.feature: rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-6 sm:p-8 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
cards.pricing: rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 border border-slate-200 bg-white transition-all duration-300 relative

inputs.default: w-full rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-body border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 focus:border-orange-500 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400

badges.sovereign: fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-50 flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur border border-slate-200 rounded-full shadow-lg font-mono text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700

landing_page.hero_headline: Replace inline clamp() with 'text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl'. Ensure 'Run Your Business' is on one line if possible, or break semantically.
landing_page.hero_subtext: Change to 'text-lg sm:text-xl text-slate-600 font-medium leading-relaxed'. Remove bolding on 'Meet BIQc..' and integrate it as a kicker or label.
landing_page.feature_cards: Standardize titles to H3 style. Standardize body text to body_small style. Remove inline pixel values.
landing_page.stats_section: Ensure numbers use font-heading and extrabold weight. Labels must be font-mono uppercase.
landing_page.trust_bar: Quote text should be 'italic text-slate-600 font-body'. Attribution should be 'font-heading font-semibold'.

contact_page.form_labels: Use 'micro_label' style defined in typography scale. Ensure consistent uppercase tracking.
contact_page.input_fields: Remove inline styles. Use the 'inputs.default' class set defined above.
contact_page.headings: Align H1 size with other page headers (H2 on landing page).
contact_page.info_panel: Ensure text contrast is sufficient (white on dark background). Use font-body for descriptions.

checklist: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large).
Buttons must have visible focus states.
Do not rely solely on color for state (use icons or text labels).

instructions_to_main_agent: AUDIT ONLY: Do not change layout, colors, or images.
REFACTOR: Replace all inline `style={{ fontFamily: '...' }}` with Tailwind classes `font-heading`, `font-body`, `font-mono`.
REFACTOR: Replace all inline `style={{ fontSize: '...' }}` with standard Tailwind text scales.
REFACTOR: Remove arbitrary `letterSpacing` inline styles and use `tracking-tight`, `tracking-wide`, or `tracking-widest`.
CONSISTENCY: Ensure all section headings (H2) use the exact same class set.
CLEANUP: Remove unused imports if any.
TESTING: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements as requested.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
